positive: Stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial whale swimming through a cosmic nebula. The whale has gentle, elegant curves and features bioluminescent accents glowing in deep ultramarine and sapphire blue. The background nebula is composed of swirling, abstract patterns of magenta, violet, and cyan. The composition is centered, focusing on the whale's majestic silhouette against the colorful stellar cloud. Perfect for apparel print, using clean lines, high contrast, and smooth gradients. Flat vector art quality with watercolor wash effects, digital painting style.
negative: blurry, noisy, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, logo, artifacts, weird anatomy, extra limbs, bad composition, photographic, realism, grimy, messy
